# PowerModifier.Description property

The modifier's localized effect text, from label `Mod<Index>_Description` — carries D4 markup / substitution tokens (`{c_number}`, `{SF_n}`, `{payload:…}`, …), same as [`Description`](../PowerDefinition/Description.md). Empty if the description label is absent.

```csharp
public string Description { get; set; }
```
